Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Designed for speed-obsessed teams who hate friction and love clarity.

⚡

AI Workflow Engine

Describe what you want in plain language. Luminary builds, tests, and deploys the automation — no coding required.

Most used
🔗

Universal Integrations

Connect to 200+ tools instantly. Slack, GitHub, Jira, Salesforce — it all just works.

📊

Smart Analytics

Real-time dashboards that surface insights before you think to look for them.

🛡️

Enterprise Security

SOC 2 Type II, GDPR-ready, SSO, and fine-grained access controls out of the box.

🔄

Version Control

Every workflow is versioned. Roll back, fork, or collaborate with Git-style branching.

🤖

Predictive Suggestions

Luminary learns your patterns and proactively suggests optimizations before you hit bottlenecks.

How it works

From zero to automated
in under 10 minutes

01
🔌

Connect your stack

Link your existing tools with one-click OAuth. Luminary maps your data structure automatically — no manual config.

Slack connected ✓
GitHub connected ✓
Notion connected ✓
↓
02
✍️

Describe your workflow

Type what you want in plain English. "When a GitHub PR is merged, notify Slack and update the Notion doc." Done.

→ |
↓
03
🚀

Ship and iterate

Deploy with one click. Monitor live. Adjust anytime. Your workflows improve as your team grows.

Live · 0 errors
Deployed 2s ago · v1.4.2

Pricing

Start free.
Scale when you're ready.

No hidden fees, no vendor lock-in. Cancel anytime.

Free
$0/mo
Perfect for individuals and small side projects.
  • ✓ 5 active workflows
  • ✓ 3 integrations
  • ✓ 1,000 automations/mo
  • ✓ Community support
Get started
Most popular
Pro
$29/mo
For growing teams that need power and reliability.
  • ✓ Unlimited workflows
  • ✓ 200+ integrations
  • ✓ 100,000 automations/mo
  • ✓ AI suggestions
  • ✓ Priority support
Start Pro free
Enterprise
Custom
For large teams with advanced security and compliance needs.
  • ✓ Unlimited everything
  • ✓ SSO & SAML
  • ✓ SOC 2 / GDPR
  • ✓ Dedicated CSM
  • ✓ SLA guarantee
